posts.name: KPATEL
posts.cooked:
I bought a 1984 Kirwan from Je veux ce vin.

However label looks very new. Was wondering if I was frauded?

IMG_28703024×4032 2.81 MB

posts.name: alan weinberg
posts.cooked: doubt a 94 of that would be faked—3rd growth, average year. Maybe recent chateau release. Is somebody sleeping in late—upper left corner?

posts.name: Chris V a n d e r m a r e l
posts.display_username: Chris V a n d e r m a r e l

posts.name: Craig Gleason
posts.cooked: It looks like there may have been some late releases of Kirwan recently, as there are older large formats available on pre-arrival (e.g. 82, 83, 93). I would not worry about fraud with a 1984 from that Chateau.

reply_to_user.name: Chris V a n d e r m a r e l

posts.name: William Kelley
posts.cooked:
If it were a fake, I doubt whatever was used could be worse than the real thing.

However, as others have observed it appears to be a late-release bottle.

posts.name: Lasse Knudsen
posts.cooked:
William_Kelley:

If it were a fake, I doubt whatever was used could be worse than the real thing.

Don’t get him too excited about his new purchase William

posts.name: KPATEL
posts.cooked: Haha true! Mainly bought for a birth year wine for family. I’ll let yall know how the let down is lol

posts.name: Mar.kus Meer
posts.cooked: That’s probably the way to approach it. Only way to go is up!
